subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath sent down the Book and guided all men to the straight path, and hath made the Kaaba a place of pilgrimage [3.5s]... ...Peace and blessings be upon him by whom every monotheist discovered the scent of the Merciful in the world of being and by whom the banner of the knowledge of monotheism was raised amidst the religions.
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل الکتاب و هدی الکل به الی سوآء الصراط و جعل الکعبه مطاف
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @pilgrimage [Hajj] in Islam, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
